worstCases.query: Search GitHub issues for previous bug reports and summarize links; this is not SEO search or market research.
worstCases.notes: Search should resolve to GitHub operations, not SEO/market research.

worstCases.query: Create a game plan for product launch sequencing, risks, and owner follow-ups; this is not game development.
worstCases.notes: Game is idiomatic business language here.

worstCases.query: Create slides from KPI data for a board readout, not a BI dashboard or live analytics report.
worstCases.notes: KPI data is input material, not the final output surface.

worstCases.query: Write a generic customer update email template for a SaaS launch; Gmail is not involved.
worstCases.notes: Email wording alone should not invoke Gmail operational tools.

worstCases.query: Make the admin dashboard shell responsive with tab navigation and loading states; no analytics dataset is involved.
worstCases.notes: Dashboard means UI shell here.

worstCases.query: Build a local RAG-ish knowledge explorer with source paths and citations; do not start Hugging Face model training by default.
worstCases.notes: RAG should not default to model training.

worstCases.query: Check why SiteGround bandwidth spiked last week and identify web performance or traffic diagnostics to review.
worstCases.notes: Bandwidth spike is web diagnostics, not dashboard building.

worstCases.query: Inspect data quality and missing rows only; no charts, dashboard, visualization, or report should be produced.
worstCases.notes: Explicit no-output guardrail for visualization/report skills.

worstCases.query: Analyze CSV missing values, duplicate keys, and schema drift; do not build charts, dashboards, or visual reports.
worstCases.notes: Data quality should beat visualization despite CSV/chart-adjacent wording.

worstCases.query: Draft a product PRD, convert it into Linear issues, then create a roadmap presentation for stakeholders.
worstCases.notes: The deck is downstream of product planning, not the first step.

worstCases.query: Build an OpenAI Agents JS workflow with tool calls; do not use the Cloudflare Agents SDK.
worstCases.notes: Agent intent must respect platform qualifier.

worstCases.query: Review the code structure and architecture tradeoffs without performing a security scan.
worstCases.notes: Review should not always imply security review.

worstCases.query: Prototype speech-to-text from the browser microphone with silence rejection and transcript QA; do not generate text-to-speech voiceover.
worstCases.notes: Speech is ambiguous between STT and TTS.

worstCases.query: Create a Hugging Face Gradio Space demo and include Trackio run logging; do not publish a paper.
worstCases.notes: Hugging Face has multiple adjacent skills with similar vocabulary.

worstCases.query: Debug missing .bib citations in a TeX paper and explain why the references disappear.
worstCases.notes: TeX shorthand should find LaTeX doctoring.

worstCases.query: Start with Figma handoff, implement the React screen, then verify desktop and mobile behavior with Playwright screenshots.
worstCases.notes: The workflow order matters more than any single keyword.

worstCases.query: Write API documentation for existing endpoints only; do not design a backend API, add routes, or build a Node service.
worstCases.notes: API is a keyword collision between documentation and implementation.

worstCases.query: Create Figma Code Connect mappings and include component-audit notes before implementation handoff.
worstCases.notes: Support quality matters: Figma use and audit should accompany Code Connect.

worstCases.query: Run Playwright browser QA for a deployed page and collect screenshot evidence; do not remote-control desktop Chrome.
worstCases.notes: Browser QA should not overfit to Chrome-control keywords.

worstCases.query: Plan EDD and lab data import quality gates with null checks, schema ownership, and rollback criteria.
worstCases.notes: Domain jargon should not derail data engineering intent.

cases.query: Build a React dashboard UI shell with navigation, empty states, and browser QA; explicitly do not build an analytics dashboard, chart, or KPI report.
cases.notes: The word dashboard is a decoy; the intent is frontend UI shell work.

cases.query: Create a threat model and abuse-case map for the auth flow without running a vulnerability scan or deep security scan.
cases.notes: Security terms should not collapse to scan-first routing.

cases.query: Write API documentation for existing endpoints only; do not design a backend API, add routes, or build a Node service.
cases.notes: API is a keyword collision between documentation and implementation.

cases.query: Create slides from KPI data for a board readout, not a BI dashboard or live analytics report.
cases.notes: KPI data is input material, not the final output surface.

cases.query: Inspect a Figma file and annotate implementation risks; do not generate a new design system or component library.
cases.notes: Figma should route to inspection and annotation before generation.

cases.query: Draft a Gmail reply for review but do not send, archive, label, or modify the thread.
cases.notes: Gmail is correct, but operational side effects must stay out of the implied workflow.

cases.query: Look up current OpenAI API docs and quote the relevant endpoint behavior; do not build an agent workflow or ChatGPT App.
cases.notes: OpenAI docs lookup should not become implementation-first.

cases.query: Review Terraform and cloud infrastructure risk in a PR; do not deploy anything to Vercel.
cases.notes: Deploy terms are explicitly negated.

cases.query: Analyze CSV missing values, duplicate keys, and schema drift; do not build charts, dashboards, or visual reports.
cases.notes: Data quality should beat visualization despite CSV/chart-adjacent wording.

cases.query: Use the app embedded browser to reproduce a localhost layout bug and capture screenshots; do not launch desktop Chrome control.
cases.notes: Browser QA intent includes an explicit browser-control variant.

cases.query: Extract tables and citations from a PDF for review; do not turn it into slides or a presentation deck.
cases.notes: PDF should stay in extraction/document mode, not deck generation.

cases.query: Start with Figma handoff, implement the React screen, then verify desktop and mobile behavior with Playwright screenshots.
cases.notes: The workflow order matters more than any single keyword.

cases.query: Address GitHub PR review comments first, fix the failing CI job, then rerun checks and summarize what changed.
cases.notes: GitHub repair should keep review comments ahead of generic CI repair.

cases.query: Plan a Postgres migration, run data-quality checks, then write API compatibility notes for downstream clients.
cases.notes: Migration, quality, and API compatibility are separate phases.

cases.query: A Vercel deploy failed; inspect build logs, fix environment or deployment config, and browser-verify the preview.
cases.notes: Provider-specific deployment routing should not drift to Cloudflare.

cases.query: Build a Cloudflare Worker using Durable Object state, deploy with Wrangler, and add a short monitoring note.
cases.notes: Worker, Durable Object, and Wrangler terms should anchor Cloudflare.

cases.query: Debug missing .bib citations in a TeX paper, compile the LaTeX project, then verify the final PDF output.
cases.notes: Document publishing should preserve the troubleshooting-then-compile order.

cases.query: Draft a product PRD, convert it into Linear issues, then create a roadmap presentation for stakeholders.
cases.notes: The deck is downstream of product planning, not the first step.

cases.query: Capture Notion research notes with source links, then extract implementation tasks and open questions.
cases.notes: Research capture should precede ticket extraction.

cases.query: Verify the current OpenAI Agents JS docs, then implement a small Node workflow with typed tool handlers.
cases.notes: Current docs lookup is a load-bearing first step.

cases.query: Prototype speech-to-text from the browser microphone with silence rejection and transcript QA; do not generate text-to-speech voiceover.
cases.notes: Speech is ambiguous between STT and TTS.

cases.query: Synthesize user interviews, turn themes into prioritized Linear work, and produce a roadmap narrative.
cases.notes: Research synthesis should precede planning artifacts.

cases.query: Make the admin dashboard shell responsive with tab navigation and loading states; no analytics dataset is involved.
cases.notes: Dashboard means UI shell here.

cases.query: Audit data freshness, null rates, duplicate keys, and ownership rules before pipeline launch.
cases.notes: Audit collides across data, security, and dependencies.

cases.query: Audit an authentication change for security risks and evidence, including whether a security scan is warranted.
cases.notes: This audit is security-oriented, not data quality.

cases.query: Prepare a KPI performance report with metric definitions and CRO commentary; this is not an incident postmortem.
cases.notes: Report should resolve toward analytics, not reliability incidents.

cases.query: Deploy a Cloudflare Worker with Wrangler and bindings; do not route this to Vercel deployment docs.
cases.notes: Provider-specific deploy routing is the main guardrail.

cases.query: Model abuse cases and trust boundaries for a payment flow; this is a threat model, not ML model training.
cases.notes: Model is a semantic collision.

cases.query: Build an OpenAI Agents JS workflow with tool calls; do not use the Cloudflare Agents SDK.
cases.notes: Agent intent must respect platform qualifier.

cases.query: Run Playwright browser QA for a deployed page and collect screenshot evidence; do not remote-control desktop Chrome.
cases.notes: Browser QA should not overfit to Chrome-control keywords.

cases.query: Design the database schema and migration path before writing JSON examples or API docs.
cases.notes: Schema is a database concept here.

cases.query: Specify an EDD lab data import pipeline with contracts, quality gates, and rollback notes; not a CI pipeline issue.
cases.notes: Pipeline means data import, not CI/CD.

cases.query: Review the code structure and architecture tradeoffs without performing a security scan.
cases.notes: Review should not always imply security review.

cases.query: Make this app shippable on Windows with packaging, desktop integration, and release readiness checks.
cases.notes: Windows shipping is a thin alias for desktop packaging and release.

cases.query: My Nurburgring PPO car stopped making checkpoint progress after reward changes; diagnose training and lap progress.
cases.notes: PPO and track names should route to the project skill, not generic ML training.

cases.query: Turn meeting notes into decisions, action items, and follow-up tasks in Notion.
cases.notes: Meeting notes are not email triage.

cases.query: Debug missing .bib citations in a TeX paper and explain why the references disappear.
cases.notes: TeX shorthand should find LaTeX doctoring.

cases.query: Build an Ozempic beverage trend monitor with competitor positioning and weekly marketing signals; this is not healthcare advice.
cases.notes: Medical-sounding product name is a marketing-monitor task.

cases.query: Plan EDD and lab data import quality gates with null checks, schema ownership, and rollback criteria.
cases.notes: Domain jargon should not derail data engineering intent.

cases.query: Check why SiteGround bandwidth spiked last week and identify web performance or traffic diagnostics to review.
cases.notes: Bandwidth spike is web diagnostics, not dashboard building.

cases.query: Create a luxury black car landing page from a Figma mockup and preserve the premium mobility style.
cases.notes: Brand/style support should not replace Figma handoff.

cases.query: Build a local RAG-ish knowledge explorer with source paths and citations; do not start Hugging Face model training by default.
cases.notes: RAG should not default to model training.

cases.query: Generate product-shot prompts, ad angles, and creative production notes for a campaign.
cases.notes: Creative production should beat analytics despite campaign wording.

cases.query: Inspect data quality and missing rows only; no charts, dashboard, visualization, or report should be produced.
cases.notes: Explicit no-output guardrail for visualization/report skills.

cases.query: Map threats and mitigations for a new integration, but do not run any security scan.
cases.notes: Scan skills should be excluded from top five when explicitly negated.

cases.query: Ship a Cloudflare Worker with Durable Objects; Vercel should not be primary or in the first routing set.
cases.notes: Provider guardrail should be absolute here.

cases.query: Research OpenAI API docs and migration details; do not use Hugging Face model, dataset, or training skills.
cases.notes: OpenAI docs should not cross provider boundaries.

cases.query: Frontend dashboard shell only: routes, cards, filters, and responsive states; no data dashboard builder.
cases.notes: A narrower duplicate of the dashboard guardrail catches regressions.

cases.query: Write a generic customer update email template for a SaaS launch; Gmail is not involved.
cases.notes: Email wording alone should not invoke Gmail operational tools.

cases.query: Create a game plan for product launch sequencing, risks, and owner follow-ups; this is not game development.
cases.notes: Game is idiomatic business language here.

cases.query: Search GitHub issues for previous bug reports and summarize links; this is not SEO search or market research.
cases.notes: Search should resolve to GitHub operations, not SEO/market research.

cases.query: Create Figma Code Connect mappings and include component-audit notes before implementation handoff.
cases.notes: Support quality matters: Figma use and audit should accompany Code Connect.

cases.query: Prepare release readiness for a web app with deploy checklist, feature flags, monitoring, and rollback notes.
cases.notes: The best primary is release readiness, not the hosting provider.

cases.query: Validate that a security remediation PR fixes the reported issue, attach evidence, and update finding status; do not discover new findings.
cases.notes: Validation is a different workflow from discovery.

cases.query: Resolve npm peer dependency conflicts after an upgrade; do not perform a vulnerability dependency audit.
cases.notes: Dependency terms should separate conflict resolution from audit.

cases.query: Create a capacity plan for worker throughput, queues, SLOs, and when to run load tests.
cases.notes: Load testing is support, not necessarily primary.

cases.query: Verify current OpenAI API migration details from docs before implementation; do not write new API docs or build a ChatGPT App.
cases.notes: Current docs lookup should win over local authoring or app-building skills.

cases.query: Inspect Hugging Face dataset card metadata, licenses, and related evals before any model training.
cases.notes: Research source inspection should not jump to training.

cases.query: Create a Hugging Face Gradio Space demo and include Trackio run logging; do not publish a paper.
cases.notes: Hugging Face has multiple adjacent skills with similar vocabulary.

cases.query: Capture screenshot evidence for a UI bug and compare desktop/mobile states; do not turn the screenshot into code.
cases.notes: Screenshot is evidence, not image-to-code input.

cases.query: Create a reusable presentation template pack with brand placeholders and validation guidance; do not make a one-off roadmap deck.
cases.notes: Presentation template creation should beat roadmap-specific decks.

cases.query: Create a technical debt register from module hotspots, TODOs, dependency risk, and owner notes; do not resolve a dependency conflict.
cases.notes: Dependency risk is supporting evidence, not the action.

cases.query: Plan product-shot prompts, campaign offer angles, and production notes before any performance dashboard work.
cases.notes: Creative order should stay before measurement/dashboard output.

cases.query: Write an incident postmortem, extract follow-up SLO/error-budget work, and add monitoring tasks.
cases.notes: Report-like language should remain reliability-oriented.

cases.query: Design OAuth session protection and backend auth boundaries; security scanning can wait until after the design.
cases.notes: Security-adjacent auth design is not scan-first.

cases.query: Design Stripe webhook handling, idempotency, and subscription API behavior; not a GitHub webhook or CI task.
cases.notes: Webhook can be payment/API, not repo automation.

cases.query: Verify motion behavior in the browser and capture timing issues; do not design a new motion system.
cases.notes: Motion verification is different from motion authoring.

cases.query: Create a product launch risk register with owners, mitigations, and rollback triggers; do not triage security findings.
cases.notes: Risk is product/release planning, not security finding workflow.

cases.query: Estimate market size and assumptions for a new product line; do not build a dashboard.
cases.notes: Market sizing is analysis/planning, not a dashboard deliverable.

cases.query: Write an architecture decision record for choosing a queue worker pattern; not a visual design system decision.
cases.notes: Design decision vocabulary collides with design-system tooling.
